title: malus domestica var. floribunda
intro: Malus domestica var. floribunda, also known as the flowering crabapple, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the Rosaceae family. This plant is valued for its fragrant flowers, which are rich in medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Malus domestica var. floribunda include reducing inflammation and improving skin conditions, as well as providing relief from respiratory issues and digestive problems. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including wounds, fever, and sore throats.
